text:
The Celadon Porcelain Vase (, Seijiki Seiun Montsubo) is an item that was auctioned off at the Underground Auction. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 11, Chapter 100 

Appearance

The Celadon Porcelain Vase is a vase of average size with a stout body. As its name suggests, it is celadon in color and its base material is porcelain. 

Background

The vase is from the Lai Dynasty and the last of its kind still intact. 

Plot

Yorknew City arc

Following the successful bid on the Solid-Gold Execution Sword, the Underground Auction auctioneer (controlled by Shalnark) introduces the Celadon Porcelain Vase and briefly details its origin. Backstage, Shizuku finds the real vase and has Kortopi create a copy using his Gallery Fake ability. Once the item is brought out on stage, the bidding quickly climbs to 380 million.
